Package io.vertigo.vega.webservice.validation

Class DefaultDtObjectValidator<O extends io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DataObject>

All Implemented Interfaces:
DtObjectValidator<O>
public final class DefaultDtObjectValidator<O extends io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DataObject> extends AbstractDtObjectValidator<O>
Default DtObject validation : check constraints on modified fields.
